lessons.title: Writing Your First Function
lessons.description: Learn the syntax of defining and calling functions in R.

lessons.title: Function Arguments and Return Values
lessons.description: Understand arguments, default values, and how to return results.

lessons.title: Scope: Local vs Global Variables
lessons.description: Learn where variables exist and how functions see them.

lessons.title: Anonymous Functions and Functions as Objects
lessons.description: Functions can be created on the fly and passed around like data.

lessons.title: Advanced Arguments: ... (ellipsis)
lessons.description: Use the dot-dot-dot argument to pass variable numbers of arguments.
